items.name_en: Fendi❤️First series features the letter F as a design highlight, fine calfskin weaving, and a diagonal frame silhouette. The design is unique and innovative with an asymmetrical shape, stylish and sharp. It can be used as a clutch, and the detachable shoulder strap allows it to be worn as a shoulder bag, making it perfect for hand-holding. Multi-functional, soft leather with a great feel.
items.name_cn:
Fendi❤️First series features the letter F as a design highlight, fine calfskin weaving, and a diagonal frame silhouette. The design is unique and innovative with an asymmetrical shape, stylish and sharp. It can be used as a clutch, and the detachable shoulder strap allows it to be worn as a shoulder bag, making it perfect for hand-holding. Multi-functional, soft leather with a great feel.
Dimensions 24*9*18 128F
Style 129 Weave

items.name_en: Double F Monogram launches a new fashion statement Kan U bag, cleverly balancing functionality and modernity. Full bag relief design, both visually and tactilely super nice. Classic FF Logo buckle paired with exquisite retro metal details. Can be worn as a shoulder bag or crossbody, looking retro and steady.

items.name_en: Sunshine Mini Tote, fabric material, fully adorned with FF pattern jacquard embroidery, accented with transparent sequins. Black leather FENDI ROMA lettering and tortoiseshell-effect hard resin glass handle. Lined interior compartment, black leather trim, and gold metal hardware. Features two handles and an adjustable detachable thin shoulder strap, for hand-carry or shoulder wear.

items.name_en: In stock 🔥 Iconic square Baguette mini bag from the Versace by Fendi series. Gold leather material, featuring gold laser-punched FF pattern, resembling Versace metal mesh. Three Medusa metal pins adorn the front flap. FF closure features a pin. Magnetic closure, FF fabric lined interior compartment, interior pocket, and gold-finish metal hardware. Equipped with a long handle and detachable shoulder strap, for underarm carry or crossbody. 8BS066LM900

items.name_en: Iconic Peekaboo ISeeU Small Bag, hand-stitched with 306 large visible stitches, representing the Selleria classic craftsmanship passed down by FENDI artisans since 1925. Selected Cuoio Romano leather, calfskin with natural grain, tanned without any metal. Lined with calfskin, divided into two exposed interior compartments by a Cuoio Romano leather hard partition, with an interior pocket. Silver Selleria plaque, silver-finished metal fittings. Classic turn-lock on both sides. Bag comes with handle and adjustable, detachable shoulder strap, can be carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody

items.name_en: Monogram vintage backpack is here! I really love the combination of metal buckle elements and the monogram. Practical, retro, and beautiful all in one, the capacity really surprised me, it can satisfy short business trips. You really can't find this feeling in current backpacks, vintage styles are truly the best.

items.name_en: 💰Small Simply FENDI Handbag, debuted at the 2024-25 Fall/Winter Fashion Show, inspired by a vintage style from the early 1990s, named for its elegant basic design. Beige low-gloss calfskin. Adorned with signature FF decoration in matching patent leather. Features a dark brown knotted calfskin long pull tab, with an internal lined compartment and silver hardware. The bag comes with an adjustable shoulder strap for shoulder carrying.

The bag comes with an adjustable shoulder strap for shoulder carrying.
Model: 5591, Size: 22/13/4.5

items.name_en: 💰The latest runway Large Simply FENDI, classic Monogram fabric paired with dark coffee calfskin, exuding a high-end relaxed vibe. Handheld, crossbody, or underarm carry adapts to any style, so cool!
